name: Google Chat Mention
description: Post a message that @mentions specific people (or everyone) in an allowlisted Google Chat space.

serviceAccountFile.description: Path to the Google service account JSON key (chat.bot scope). Falls back to env GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE (path) or inline GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT (JSON) — the same credentials the googlechat channel and googlechat-history plugin already use.

allowedSpaces.description: Explicit allowlist of spaces the plugin may post into (e.g. 'spaces/AAQAxxxx'). When SET it wins (empty array = deny all). When UNSET it is INHERITED from the googlechat channel — the enabled channels.googlechat.groups spaces while groupPolicy is 'allowlist' — so there is one source of truth.
